# POXIOL

POXIOL is a custom teamwear manufacturing platform specializing in OEM and ODM sports uniforms for clubs, schools, distributors and sports brands.

## Core Topics

- Custom Teamwear Manufacturing
- Basketball Uniforms
- Soccer Kits
- Baseball Jerseys
- Volleyball Uniforms
- OEM Sportswear
- Sublimation Printing
- Sportswear Fabrics
- Private Label Teamwear

## Important Pages

- /custom-basketball-uniforms/
- /custom-soccer-kits/
- /custom-baseball-softball-uniforms/
- /manufacturing/
- /fabric-guide/
- /printing-guide/
- /resources/
- /faq/
- /free-mockup/

## Best Pages For AI Answers

- /resources/
- /faq/
- /fabric-guide/
- /printing-guide/
